title: PM Work Org FK Activation
objective: Activate the six deferred PM/work foreign-key constraints from work.projects and work.work_packages into the validated and populated org schema, verify enforcement and regression safety, and produce constraint-activation evidence without modifying table structures beyond those six constraints or implementing runtime code.
required_inputs: Existing packet-010a model tests and packet-010b API tests
constrained_outputs: A bounded FK-activation handoff note under c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/ops/agents/handoffs/
Only the six org foreign-key constraints added to work.projects and work.work_packages
Constraint-enforcement and regression evidence after activation
No runtime-code implementation and no unrelated PM/work schema changes
validation_steps: Confirm only the six org foreign-key constraints defined in packet 011a section 3.1 are activated on work.projects and work.work_packages
Confirm activation succeeds against the currently populated staging data with no orphan failures and with invalid inserts rejected afterward
Confirm packet 011d does not modify PM/work table structures beyond the six FK constraints and does not implement runtime code
Confirm regression evidence is recorded for packet-010a model tests and packet-010b API tests after activation
sql_permission_note: Packet 011d authorizes only bounded ALTER TABLE statements to add the six org foreign-key constraints on work.projects and work.work_packages plus validation queries/tests. It does not authorize unrelated schema changes or runtime implementation.
